# Copy-Pasta Prompts – E2E Gaps 2025

Use these prompts to ask the agent to implement each part of the plan. Run in order.

---

## Phase 1

**Prompt:** Implement the plan in `.llm/plans/active/e2e-gaps-2025/01-management-buckets-delete-cancel-and-empty-state.md`. Do not edit the plan file itself. Add the buckets delete-cancel test and one management-web empty-state test as specified. Run the affected specs to verify.

---

## Phase 2

**Prompt:** Implement the plan in `.llm/plans/active/e2e-gaps-2025/02-web-settings-and-429-deferral.md`. Do not edit the plan file itself. Add the web settings tab/control assertion (or create authenticated settings spec if missing) and add the 429 deferral comment as specified. Run the affected specs to verify.
